task_completion.description: The agent opens or reads the input FITS file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing a script, terminal command, or GUI tool opening '~/AstroImages/raw/hst_wfpc2_sample.fits'.

task_completion.description: The agent crops the image to a rectangular region of interest centered on a bright star.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Code or tool interface showing the definition of a bounding box or array slicing with dimensions between 20x20 and 150x150 pixels.

task_completion.description: The agent saves the cropped image as a FITS file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Code or terminal output showing the cropped data being saved to '~/AstroImages/processed/psf_crop.fits', or the file appearing in the file explorer/terminal.

task_completion.description: The agent generates and saves a 3D surface plot of the cropped region.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 3D surface plot visible in a plot window or code saving a figure to '~/AstroImages/processed/psf_surface.png'.

task_completion.description: The agent saves the peak pixel statistics to a text file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor, script, or terminal echo showing the creation of '~/AstroImages/processed/psf_stats.txt' containing 'crop_width', 'crop_height', 'peak_value', 'peak_x', and 'peak_y'.

integrity.description: The 3D surface plot is generated from the actual FITS data.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent uses a script (e.g., matplotlib plot_surface) or an astronomical tool to render the plot, rather than downloading or copying an external image.

integrity.description: The peak statistics are genuinely computed from the cropped image.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent uses code (e.g., numpy argmax/max) or a tool's measurement feature to find the peak value and coordinates, rather than hardcoding arbitrary numbers.

integrity.description: The output files are genuine results of the processing steps.
integrity.visual_evidence: The FITS, PNG, and TXT files are created as a direct result of the agent's data processing actions, not as empty or placeholder files.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Input file: /home/ga/AstroImages/raw/hst_wfpc2_sample.fits. Expected outputs must be in /home/ga/AstroImages/processed/: psf_crop.fits, psf_surface.png, and psf_stats.txt. The crop must be between 20x20 and 150x150 pixels.
